name: Okta: Privileged Users with Unexpected Status
description: Finds users with role assignments whose status is not ACTIVE.
query:
MATCH p = (u:Okta_User)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment|Okta_MemberOf*1..2]->(r:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE u.status <> "ACTIVE"
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
